nodeDataArray.text: Thinking about how to generate sustainable energy for the future
It may be that promoting biomass power generation could lead to sustainable energy．
It may be that energy can be generated by using waste produced from certain power generation methods．
It may be that waste from thermal power generation can be used as fuel for biomass power generation．
It may be that solar thermal power generation cannot be widely adopted．
It may be that solar thermal power generation cannot be operated in parallel with photovoltaic power generation．
It may be that nuclear power generation is not actually harmful．
It may be that there is no way to use nuclear power generation safely．
It may be that methods utilizing nuclear power generation cannot be explored．
